a:r.a:t: No continuity in decision making process with unclear decision rights (no RACI) and no centralized governance model
Legacy compensation structures, reporting process, and data outputs
Independently sets SPIFFs / STIs, rates, and plan tier levels with input from business operations
Sets targets with Finance inputs, oversight spans across regions and BUs with impact from legacy brands
Strengthen governance and controls to reduce legal / compliance risk
Limited continuity in decisions and lack of a Center of Excellence (
No Shared Standards | Moving Targets | Blind Quota Setting | Fragmented Data Sourcing/Reporting
Same role = different comp across brands, regions, and sites
Disparate brands, no formal governance, and lack of compensation philosophy create fragmentation, undermine trust, and prevent growth
